name: The Reification
image_sign_text: NOW TANGIBLE. NOW REAL. NOW YOURS.
effect: Convert a concept into a deliverable artifact. This card is considered concrete.

clauses.name: ARTIFACT CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a document, slide deck, or diagram is produced: The abstraction is considered resolved.

clauses.name: OWNERSHIP EFFECT
clauses.rule: When the artifact is assigned an owner: All further questions are redirected to that owner.

clauses.name: DURABILITY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no one references the artifact within ninety days: It is considered a foundation for future work.

witness_quote: At least we have something to show.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Is the thing different, or just described?
